heading: Procedure
body:
**Atlascli:**

Atlas CLI

To return logs of the specified Data Federation database for your project using the
Atlas CLI, run the following command:

```sh

atlas dataFederation logs <name> [options]

```

To learn more about the command syntax and parameters, see the
Atlas CLI documentation for [atlas dataFederation logs](atlas/cli/current/command/atlas-dataFederation-logs).

**Api:**

Atlas Administration API

To download query logs using the API, send a `GET` request to the
Data Federation `queryLogs.gz` endpoint. To learn more about the API syntax
and options, see [Download Query Logs for One Federated
Database](api/doc/atlas-admin-api-v2/operation/operation-downloadgroupclusteronlinearchivequerylogs).

**Ui:**

Atlas UI

To download query logs:

Choose one of the following time periods:

- Last 4 Hours

- Last 8 Hours

- Last 12 Hours

- Last 24 Hours

- Custom Date

The downloaded log filename is in the following format:

```shell
<federated-database-instance-name>_<start-date>_<end-date>_queries.log.gz
```
